notes:
🏁 Backwards compatible with older Forzas. The Forza preset now covers Horizon 4, 5 and 6: auto-detect, menus, garage and ducking all work whichever one you launch.

⚠️ You'll need telemetry on in those games too: same Data Out steps as the setup guide.

🚗 Skipping finally behaves everywhere. D-pad skip locks itself through every menu, garage, Auto Show and car picker (volume dips too), and snaps back the moment you drive off. Parked in the open world still skips fine.

🎙️ Discord ducking. Turn on "Include Discord" and your music ducks when friends talk, in Forza or any game. The new "Include self" option ducks when YOU talk back too.

⚡ Massive CPU drop. Speech detection now uses about 60x less CPU, and it pauses itself in menus.

🏎️ Sim wheel fix. Segue no longer breaks force feedback, wheel input is now fully read-only.

🥅 Rocket League: music ducks under Discord voice, and Left stick press is the new skip option.

🎮 Summon Segue from your controller. Hold the mic button (rebindable on every pad) and the app pops up right over your game, hold again to hide it. Keyboard works everywhere too: Ctrl+Shift+Alt+S.

📏 Overlay glow-up. Drag it to ANY monitor, resize up to 200% with a corner drag or scroll, and hold Shift while dragging for clean alignment guides that snap to the edges and center.

🎵 TIDAL and Amazon Music added as sources, tucked into the source menu's new "More" page.

🕹️ Xbox console support (experimental). Forza on Xbox, music on the PC? Point the console's Data Out at your PC's IP and Segue follows the game: menus and races drive your music volume automatically, just like on PC. Controller buttons (D-pad skip etc.) stay PC-only, and for speech ducking route the console audio through the PC (Remote Play) and turn on "Include Discord".

🛠️ Plus: touchpad tap sensitivity slider, DualShock 4 Bluetooth fix, non-DualSense pads now work in game, controller auto-reconnect, dark tooltips, overlay stays above the game, decluttered Controls, and a permanent Discord invite.
headline: Segue 1.3 is out 🏁 Garage-proof skipping, Discord ducking + more
